subcodes.first_line: Thy letter hath attained the Divine Presence and hath been honored with the gaze of loving-kindness of the Lord of all Names. Blessed is the soul that hath attained unto the Throne [3.5s]... ...I counsel you, O friends of God, to comport yourselves with the utmost trustworthiness in your dealings with my servants and people.
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتابت لدی الوجه حاضر و بلحاظ عنایات مالک اسماء مشرف طوبی لنفس حضر لدی العرش
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @honesty; truthfulness; trustworthiness, @divine attributes are within all things; every atom, @soul; spirit after death, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
